title: Open vs Closed AI: The Future Is CHEAPER & SMARTER #shorts
summary: The video argues that the performance and capability gap between open-source and closed-source AI models is narrowing rapidly. This is framed as beneficial for businesses and developers due to increased innovation and likely cost advantages.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof makes the case that the performance gap between open-source and closed-source AI models is closing quickly. The argument: open models are on track to be both cheaper and more capable, touching on enterprise AI and model compression. The stated implications fall on business adoption and developer choice, where lower cost and rising capability shift the calculus toward open options.
